component.name: UAPMD
component.summary: Host audio plugins as virtual MIDI 2.0 devices

description.p: UAPMD (Ubiquitous Audio Plugin MIDI Device) hosts audio plugins and exposes them as virtual MIDI 2.0 devices, letting any MIDI-capable application use software synthesizers and effects without native plugin support.

ul.li: Host VST3, AudioUnit, LV2, and CLAP audio plugins
Expose plugins as virtual MIDI 2.0 devices
Built-in sequencer with piano roll and MIDI 2.0 clip editing
Plugin parameter and preset control via program list
Scriptable via JavaScript API and MCP (Model Context Protocol)
Cross-platform: Linux, macOS, Windows, Android, iOS, and browser (WebAssembly)
